summary:
Retrieval@10 — hit-rate 95% · recall 26% · MRR 0,727 (n=150; recall e hit-rate divergem quando há múltiplas fontes esperadas)
  per-group: real-keyword (n=50): hit-rate 84% · recall 18% · MRR 0,483 | synthetic-keyword (n=50): hit-rate 100% · recall 31% · MRR 0,787 | synthetic-question (n=50): hit-rate 100% · recall 30% · MRR 0,911
